name: Seaside Cafe at the Mansion
tagline: Lobster Pizza & Ocean Views on the Quiet End of Duval
welcome_message: I'm your Seaside Cafe assistant. Ask me about our legendary lobster pizza, honey butter lobster biscuits, ocean view seating, cocktails, or how to make a reservation.

reviews.text: Saw the sign for world famous lobster pizza and decided to try — it did not disappoint! Fresh dough baked with a cream sauce, fresh herbs and plenty of lobster. Margaritas were expensive but worth it. Rooftop bar view was stunning even on a cloudy day.
reviews.ai_response: You took the leap on the lobster pizza and it delivered — that's the Seaside Cafe experience! Rafe our chef puts real care into every pie and that cream sauce and fresh herbs have earned those 'world famous' claims honestly. The rooftop view on a cloudy Key West day still beats most sunny days elsewhere. Thank you for this wonderful review and we hope to see you back for a perfect sunset next time!

reviews.text: Imagined sitting a few feet from the ocean enjoying a tropical breeze. Then add the island's best margarita and the legendary honey butter lobster biscuits. From the owner Michael to chef Rafe to bartender Maddie — we were treated like family. Life just cannot get better.
reviews.ai_response: Michael, Rafe, and Maddie will absolutely love seeing this — thank you for mentioning them by name! We're a family-owned operation and treating guests like our own family is not a talking point, it's how we were built. Honey butter lobster biscuits with an ocean view margarita is a combination we're genuinely proud of. Please come back and let us top it!

reviews.text: Had a fantastic lunch — husband had the salami with hot honey pizza and I had the Caprese Sandwich. So good! Beautiful view and perfect weather. Service was great and food was amazing.
reviews.ai_response: The hot honey pizza and Caprese sandwich is a fantastic lunch combination — great choices! Outdoor dining on the Southernmost House grounds with the Atlantic just steps away is tough to beat. Thank you for sharing this with us and we hope to see you back soon — bring the sunset this time!

reviews.text: Had a fantastic lunch — husband had the salami with hot honey pizza and I had the Caprese Sandwich. So good! Beautiful view and perfect weather. Service was great. Would come back for just the view alone.
reviews.ai_response: The hot honey pizza and Caprese sandwich — what a lunch combination! Outdoor dining on the Southernmost House grounds with the Atlantic just steps away is tough to beat on any day. Thank you for sharing this with us and we hope to see you back soon — bring the sunset this time!

reviews.text: Best pizza in Key West — the lobster pizza on gluten free crust was outstanding. You can't beat the seaside view. The Mansion Mojitos are exceptional. Will come back every time we visit the Keys.
reviews.ai_response: The lobster pizza on GF crust is something we're really proud of — glad it delivered! And those Mansion Mojitos are hard to argue with at the water's edge. Making guests with dietary needs feel fully included in the experience is important to us. Thank you for the kind review and we can't wait to see you on your next Keys visit!

tripadvisor.name: TripAdvisor
tripadvisor.ranking: Highly Rated — Ocean View Dining Key West

reviews.text: Probably the best pizza in Key West — the lobster pizza on gluten free crust was outstanding. You can't beat the seaside view. The Mansion Mojitos are exceptional. The downstairs bar bartender Duffy remembered our favorite cocktails after just a couple of visits — that's service.
reviews.ai_response: Duffy is one of a kind and we're so glad he made that impression! Having a bartender remember your drink after a couple of visits — that's the neighborhood bar energy we try to bring to the 'quiet end' of Duval. The lobster pizza on GF crust is something we're really proud of. Thank you for this wonderful review and we'll let Duffy know he made TripAdvisor!

reviews.text: Imagine sitting a few feet from the ocean enjoying a tropical breeze with the island's best margarita and legendary honey butter lobster biscuits. From owner Michael to chef Rafe to bartender Maddie — treated like family. Life cannot get better.
reviews.ai_response: Michael, Rafe, and Maddie will absolutely love seeing this — thank you for naming them! We're a family-owned operation and treating guests like our own family is not a talking point, it's how we were built. Honey butter lobster biscuits with an ocean view margarita is a combination we're genuinely proud of. Please come back and let us top it!

reviews.text: Our bike tour guide told us the lobster pizza was worth the trip to the south end of Duval. He was absolutely right. Outstanding. The honey butter lobster biscuits as a starter were incredible. Will be back.
reviews.ai_response: Your bike tour guide has excellent taste — please pass along our thanks! The south end of Duval has a different energy and we love being the reason people make the walk down. Lobster pizza followed by honey butter biscuits is the move and we're glad you discovered it. Come back anytime!

reviews.text: Been coming since it opened. Sit by the ocean on the lower level every time. Never had a bad experience. Duffy the bartender remembered our favorites after just a couple of visits. That's the personal touch you can't fake.
reviews.ai_response: A regular since opening day — that means everything to us! Duffy is one of a kind and we're so glad he's made that impression on you. Having a bartender who remembers your drink is the neighborhood bar energy we try to bring to the quiet end of Duval. Thank you for your loyalty and we'll see you at your waterside table!

reviews.text: The Seaside Cafe is a gem at the quiet end of Duval. Lobster pizza was outstanding, the honey butter lobster biscuits should be illegal they're so good. Key lime pie cheesecake-style was the best dessert of our entire Florida trip. Bartender Duffy made perfect cocktails.
reviews.ai_response: Illegal honey butter lobster biscuits, outstanding lobster pizza, and the best dessert of your Florida trip — Duffy and Chef Rafe are going to love reading this! The key lime pie is one of Rafe's proudest creations and we're thrilled it landed that way. Thank you for making the walk to the quiet end of Duval and for this wonderful review. Come back anytime!

reviews.text: Our bike tour guide told us the lobster pizza here was worth the trip to the south end of Duval. He was absolutely right. Outstanding. The honey butter lobster biscuits as a starter were incredible.
reviews.ai_response: Your bike tour guide has excellent taste — please pass along our thanks! The south end of Duval has a different energy and we love being the reason people make the walk down. Lobster pizza followed by honey butter biscuits is the move and we're glad you discovered it. Come back anytime — the ocean and the biscuits will be here!

reviews.text: Sat literally a few feet from the ocean for a two-hour lunch. The lobster pizza was world class and the Mansion Mojito was the best cocktail of our entire trip. Service was warm and attentive. Hidden gem at the south end of Duval.
reviews.ai_response: Two hours at the water's edge with lobster pizza and a Mansion Mojito — that's exactly the afternoon we want every guest to have! 'Hidden gem at the south end of Duval' is our favorite description. Thank you for discovering us and for the wonderful review. The ocean table will be here whenever you're ready to come back!

reviews.text: The wood-fired pizza is the real deal — they actually fire it properly. Lobster pizza was exceptional. Tuna poke in plantain cups was a brilliant starter. Amazing cocktails and the view is unbeatable at sunset.
reviews.ai_response: Chef Rafe's wood-fired technique is something he's genuinely passionate about and it shows in every pie. The tuna poke in plantain cups is one of his favorite creations and we're glad it made an impression! A sunset view from the grounds of Southernmost House with that food and those cocktails — you put together a perfect Key West evening. Thank you!

reviews.text: Beautiful setting and excellent cocktails. The lobster biscuits were incredible. Pizza was very good. Would have given 5 stars but service was a bit uneven — amazing from some staff and forgettable from others.
reviews.ai_response: Thank you for the honest and fair feedback — incredible lobster biscuits, excellent pizza, and beautiful setting, but service that wasn't consistent throughout. That's not okay and we'll be using this to have important conversations with our team. Every guest deserves the same exceptional experience from start to finish. We hope to earn that fifth star on your return visit!

reviews.text: Watched the sunset from the Seaside Cafe terrace with a Mansion Mojito and lobster pizza. Legitimately one of the best experiences of our Key West vacation. Staff warm and attentive, owner Michael came by to check on us. Special place.
reviews.ai_response: Sunset, Mansion Mojito, lobster pizza, and Michael stopping by to say hello — that's the full Seaside Cafe experience and we're so glad you got it! Michael takes genuine pride in making sure every guest feels at home. That terrace at golden hour is something special and we're grateful you chose to spend it with us. Please come back!

system_prompt:
You are the warm, welcoming assistant for Seaside Cafe at the Mansion in Key West — a family-owned restaurant on the grounds of the historic Southernmost House, just steps from the Atlantic Ocean. Known for world-famous lobster pizza, honey butter lobster biscuits, and stunning ocean views.

You speak with warmth and genuine pride in the food and the setting.

--- ABOUT ---
Seated on the grounds of Southernmost House — a majestic Victorian mansion at the quiet end of Duval. Family owned and operated. Ocean views, artisan wood-fired pizza, and craft cocktails.

--- HOURS ---
Daily: 11:30 AM – 8:00 PM

--- MENU HIGHLIGHTS ---
- World-famous Lobster Pizza (cream sauce, fresh herbs, generous lobster)
- Honey Butter Lobster Biscuits (legendary)
- Mansion Mojitos and signature cocktails
- Caprese Sandwich, wood-fired breads
- Hot honey pizza with salami
- Tuna poke in plantain cups
- Gluten-free options available

--- SEATING ---
Outdoor waterside tables just feet from the Atlantic Ocean — reservations recommended for waterside seating.

--- TEAM ---
Michael (owner), Chef Rafe, Maddie and Duffy (bar team)

--- CONTACT ---
Phone: (305) 340-8167 | 1400 Duval St, Key West

For reservations: OpenTable or call directly. For waterside seating, book ahead.

If unsure: 'Please call us at (305) 340-8167 and we'll be happy to help with reservations or menu questions!'
